title: A Few Swords
description:
Well that's a lot of swords.
Actually, there's just a few.
body:
# Just a _wee_ bit of Swords
Once upon a time, I was minding my own buisness when [TheAxolotlLord](https://modrinth.com/user/TheAxolotlLord), the guy editing this description, showed me his mod about pickaxes, so I tried to make a similar thing. 
![Some of the swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75bd9a5491040c24e11b8a86a0f991b49bcdeca5.png)
## Well then, what swords are there?
- Sword Of Sword: Double the sword, double the stats!
- Emrerald Sword: Finally...
- La Baguette Sword: Baguette
- Fake Sword: Pretty Convincing, am I right?
- "Ultimate" Sword: With ~~fake~~ great power, comes a "great" sword.
- Pen Sword: I mean... it's a pen?
- Stick Sword: Not really a sword...
- Fire Sword: Did you really just put fire aspect as a sword
- Missing Sword: item.missing_sword.desc
- Missing Missing Sword:‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎  ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ 
- Copper Sword: A sword. Made of copper.
- Amethyst Sword: The old description of this item was "I need to stop". Yes, you do.
- Bad Sword: Why would it be bad? Wait, what do they mean by _bad_?
- Dirt Sword: A easy way to get a weapon.
- Sand Sword: Sand can be smelted, right?
- Glass Sword: What happens when you smelt a Glass Sword?
- Sword Handle: This.
- Steak Sword: Yummy!
- Uranium Sword: Also yummy...?
- Troll Sword: You know the rules, and so do I.
- 3D Sword: It's not flat?
- Fork Sword: Like a trident, but a fork, but a sword, but not a utensil.
- Sharpened Fry: They're already sharp enough!
- Upside Down Sword: Why would you hold a Sword by the **_BLADE_**??
- TNT Sword: A Sweet Blade... KABOOM!!!
- Removed Herobrine Sword

and prolly more coming

Now with **??%** better textures!

### Credits
Thanks to [TheAxolotlLord](https://modrinth.com/user/TheAxolotlLord) for the idea and for editing this description (wait, but wouldn't that mean I'm thanking myself?). 
This mod was made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).
